---
title: "SummerSchoolProj"
author: "Noemi Veronese"
affiliation: "Università degli Studi di Padova"
date: today
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-title: Contenuti
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    grid: 
      sidebar-width: 200px
      body-width: 900px
      margin-width: 400px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
    theme: 
      light: minty
      dark: superhero
self-contained: true

---

# Presentation

Questo è il mio sito!

## Sub presentation

Sub secion

### Sub sub section

Another subu

#### My paragraph


```{r}
1 + 1
```

You can add options to executable code like this 

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
